ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the player is from */,
  "handicap" REAL /* Player's handicap */,
  "pro_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player is a professional (true) or amateur (false) */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "swing_type" TEXT /* Type of swing (e.g., draw, fade, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "putting_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each putting statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the statistic was recorded */,
  "rank_this_week" INTEGER /* Current week's ranking in putting from a specific distance */,
  "rank_last_week" INTEGER /* Previous week's ranking in putting from a specific distance */,
  "rounds_played" INTEGER /* Number of rounds played */,
  "pct_made" REAL /* Percentage of putts made from a specific distance */,
  "attempts" INTEGER /* Total number of putts attempted from a specific distance */,
  "putts_made" INTEGER /* Total number of putts made from a specific distance */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., Puttingfrom20ft) */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance from the hole in feet */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of surface (e.g., grass, artificial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_putting_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "par" INTEGER /* Par of the tournament course */,
  "yardage" INTEGER /* Total yardage of the tournament course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_tournaments" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's participation in a tournament */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tournament */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Final ranking in the tournament */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Total score in the tournament */,
  "prize_money" REAL /* Prize money won in the tournament */,
  "cuts_made" INTEGER /* Number of cuts made in the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tournaments_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tournaments_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "achievement_name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement */,
  "date_achieved" TEXT /* Date the achievement was achieved */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the achievement */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., tournament win, top 10 finish) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "accessed_table" TEXT /* Table name of the accessed data */,
  "accessed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accessed record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player profile */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "career_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of career wins */,
  "career_earnings" REAL /* Total career earnings */,
  "career_high_rank" INTEGER /* Highest career ranking */,
  "college" TEXT /* College attended by the player */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* High school attended by the player */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biographical information about the player */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the player's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_profiles_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach-player relationship */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the coaching relationship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the coaching relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_coaches_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., back strain, wrist sprain) */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Expected recovery date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
